title: White Wax Tea Light Candles in Aluminum Case, Pack of 10-7-Hour Burn Time, Unscented, Ideal for Candle Holders
features: LONG-LASTING BURN: Our white tea light candles (pack of 10) offer an impressive 7-hour burn time, allowing for extended periods of relaxation or decoration. This means you can enjoy a tranquil atmosphere without having to constantly replace the candles.
HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Each tea light candle is crafted from high-grade wax encased in an aluminum case for a clean burn and durable support, ensuring stability and safety.

EASY SETUP: These white tea lights can be easily set up in any candle holder without any hassle. This allows you to quickly add a touch of finesse to your space, whether it's for a special occasion or just daily use.
MULTIPURPOSE USE: Whether you're hosting a wedding, setting up a spa-like ambiance, or simply unwinding at home, these candles can add a touch of elegance to any space.

UNSCENTED BLISS: Our white tea light candles are unscented, making them perfect for various settings. Whether you're using them for dining, meditation, or as accent lighting, you can enjoy the natural soft glow without any added fragrance.
description: Product Description DESCRIPTION: Premium quality pack of tealight candles are designed with a small wax candles in a tin can container create mood and atmosphere in any surrounding. Safety Warning No warning applicable
